title: MCP catalog introspection (7 RPCs + 7 tools)
note_on_git_pinning: Applied via the Lovable executor path, not from a reviewed Git commit. Per §10 of the convention, this is temporary containment: the receipt records file paths + sha256, live-catalog verification, and grant-boundary evidence, but does not prove the applied SQL byte-matches a reviewed main-branch commit.

migration_files.purpose: Create the seven mcp_list_* catalog RPCs (SECURITY DEFINER, pinned search_path).
Explicit REVOKE EXECUTE ... FROM anon on all seven catalog RPCs (Supabase default privileges had auto-granted anon EXECUTE despite REVOKE FROM PUBLIC).

phase_a_catalog_verification.query: SELECT p.proname, p.prosecdef, p.provolatile, l.lanname, has_function_privilege('authenticated', p.oid, 'EXECUTE') AS auth_exec, has_function_privilege('anon', p.oid, 'EXECUTE') AS anon_exec, has_function_privilege('service_role', p.oid, 'EXECUTE') AS svc_exec FROM pg_proc p JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid=p.pronamespace JOIN pg_language l ON l.oid=p.prolang WHERE n.nspname='public' AND p.proname LIKE 'mcp_list_%' AND p.proname<>'mcp_list_schema' ORDER BY p.proname;
phase_a_catalog_verification.assertion: All seven RPCs present with SECURITY DEFINER, STABLE volatility, and the required grant matrix (authenticated + service_role EXECUTE; anon revoked).

phase_a_environment_context.query: SELECT extname FROM pg_extension WHERE extname='pg_cron';

phase_b_endpoint_verification.root_cause: mcp-js's OAuth-issuer verifier requires a token carrying an OAuth client_id claim (issued via the Supabase OAuth 2.1 authorization server + dynamic client registration). The sandbox curl tool injects the preview user's plain signInWithPassword session JWT, which by design lacks client_id and is rejected. This is the intended defence documented in the app-mcp-server-authoring knowledge; it does not indicate a defect in the RPCs or the tool wiring.
phase_b_endpoint_verification.outstanding_verification: Invoke each catalog_* tool once from a real MCP client (Claude Code or ChatGPT Connectors) authenticated via the app's OAuth consent screen, capture the structured response, and paste the seven results into this receipt as phase_b_results before moving to docs/releases/. Expected qualitative results per plan §5 Phase B: catalog_functions includes has_role / enforce_vat_filing_gate / enforce_ct600_filing_gate; catalog_policies non-empty for user_roles; catalog_grants + catalog_rls_status non-empty with rls_enabled=true on tenant-scoped tables; catalog_indexes returns rows for company_persons and company_pscs including the non-partial unique indexes; catalog_cron includes process-email-queue plus the two chaser jobs.

asserts: Every catalog_* tool declares readOnlyHint:true, openWorldHint:false and forwards to the matching mcp_list_* RPC.
Every tool passes its documented filter arguments server-side (no .filter() usage in tool code).
The regenerated manifest exposes all seven catalog_* tools with the required annotations.
The nine pre-existing MCP tools remain wired in defineMcp.

rollback.plan: One migration to drop the seven RPCs and one code change to remove the seven tools from defineMcp.
sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.mcp_list_functions(text, boolean);
rollback.code: Revert src/lib/mcp/index.ts tool-array additions and delete src/lib/mcp/tools/catalog-*.ts; re-run app_mcp_server--extract_mcp_manifest.
